badge.title: Badge
badge.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

icon.title: Icon
icon.description: Normalizes icon size, stroke, and accessibility behavior across GunjoUI.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

chatMessage.title: ChatMessage
chatMessage.description: Single chat transcript row for assistant, user, system, and typing states.

img.title: Img
img.description: An enhanced image component with loading skeleton and error fallback.

imagePreview.title: ImagePreview
imagePreview.description: Framed image preview surface for asset cards, pickers, and media inspection.

toolPill.title: ToolPill
toolPill.description: Compact icon pill used for toolbar quick actions with active and danger states.

skeleton.title: Skeleton
skeleton.description: Loading placeholder for content while it is being fetched.

code.title: Code
code.description: Inline code style for monospaced text content.

spacer.title: Spacer
spacer.description: Flex-grow filler for pushing siblings to the edges of a flex container.

emptyState.title: EmptyState
emptyState.description: Placeholder for lists / panels with no data, with optional CTA.

tag.title: Tag
tag.description: Removable badge with × button. Useful for filter chips and tag editors.

colorSwatch.title: ColorSwatch
colorSwatch.description: Color preview chip with copyable hex/rgb value.

card.title: Card
card.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

headerDescription.content: Deploy your new project in one-click.

accordion.title: Accordion
accordion.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content.

contentText.content: Yes. It adheres to the WAI-ARIA design pattern.

accordionGroup.title: AccordionGroup
accordionGroup.description: Labeled accordion composition with a single expand-all/collapse-all toggle control for FAQ, settings, and grouped disclosure lists.

searchableAccordion.title: SearchableAccordion
searchableAccordion.description: Searchable and category-filterable accordion composition for FAQ, help, and docs lists.

list.title: List
list.description: A semantic list component with customizable markers and spacing.

carousel.title: Carousel
carousel.description: Embla-powered slider with keyboard and arrow controls.

dataTable.title: DataTable
dataTable.description: Table + sort + filter + pagination integrated. Wraps @tanstack/react-table.

actionDataTable.title: ActionDataTable
actionDataTable.description: Selectable data table composition with bulk actions, row actions, and disabled-action feedback.

avatarGroup.title: AvatarGroup
avatarGroup.description: Stack of overlapping avatars with optional +N overflow indicator.

codeBlock.title: CodeBlock
codeBlock.description: Syntax-highlighted code block with optional filename and copy button.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Vertical time-ordered list with markers and connector lines.

treeView.title: TreeView
treeView.description: Hierarchical tree with expand/collapse for file explorers and navigation.

fileTree.title: FileTree
fileTree.description: File and folder tree composition with metadata, row actions, and single or multiple selection.

docNote.title: DocNote
docNote.description: Supplemental note block for explanatory copy, references, and non-urgent documentation callouts.

markdownRenderer.title: MarkdownRenderer
markdownRenderer.description: Markdown to HTML rendering with GFM (tables, task lists, code).

statistic.title: Statistic
statistic.description: KPI metric card: label + value + delta indicator.

assetCard.title: AssetCard
assetCard.description: Selectable media asset card for image libraries, files, and generated creative results with favorite, score, and preview affordances.

assetGrid.title: AssetGrid
assetGrid.description: Responsive grouped media grid that renders AssetCard items with empty state, selection state, and preview hooks.

metadataList.title: MetadataList
metadataList.description: Definition-list style metadata rows for inspectors, file details, and compact property summaries.

tagEditor.title: TagEditor
tagEditor.description: Tag editing control composed from TagInput and suggestion actions for asset inspectors and filter panels.

chartLegend.title: ChartLegend
chartLegend.description: Legend rows for chart series, values, and token-driven markers.

sparklineChart.title: SparklineChart
sparklineChart.description: Compact HTML/CSS line, area, or stepped trend chart for dense dashboard cards with hover/focus point tooltips.

lineChart.title: LineChart
lineChart.description: HTML/CSS multi-series line or area chart for time-series comparison with reference lines, legends, and hover/focus point tooltips.

ribbonChart.title: RibbonChart
ribbonChart.description: HTML/CSS ribbon chart for comparing changing flow, volume, or segment width across periods with hover/focus point tooltips.

radialBarChart.title: RadialBarChart
radialBarChart.description: HTML/CSS concentric radial bar chart for comparing progress, share, or capacity across multiple series with hover/focus tooltips.

barChart.title: BarChart
barChart.description: Token-driven vertical or horizontal bar chart with optional average marker and hover/focus value tooltips.

concentricProgressCard.title: Concentric Progress Card
concentricProgressCard.description: HTML/CSS card for storage, quota, and multi-ring progress widgets with selectable concentric rings, metrics, and hover/focus tooltips.

stackedBarChart.title: StackedBarChart
stackedBarChart.description: HTML/CSS stacked vertical or horizontal bar chart for grouped segment comparisons with hover/focus segment tooltips.

distributionBar.title: DistributionBar
distributionBar.description: Stacked percentage distribution bar for segments, channels, and allocation data with hover/focus segment tooltips.

miniDistributionBarCard.title: Mini Distribution Bar Card
miniDistributionBarCard.description: HTML/CSS compact distribution card for product categories, capacity, and utilization widgets with dense ticks, selected segment details, and hover/focus tooltips.

segmentTimelineCard.title: Segment Timeline Card
segmentTimelineCard.description: HTML/CSS horizontal segment timeline card for sleep stages, uptime states, and categorical duration ranges with metrics, markers, and hover/focus tooltips.

donutChart.title: DonutChart
donutChart.description: HTML/CSS donut chart for proportional segments with optional center labels and pointer-aware segment tooltips.

pieChart.title: PieChart
pieChart.description: HTML/CSS pie chart for proportional segment comparisons with pointer-aware segment tooltips.

gaugeChart.title: GaugeChart
gaugeChart.description: HTML/CSS semi-circle gauge for scores, progress, and capacity readings with hover/focus value tooltip.

segmentedGaugeCard.title: Segmented Gauge Card
segmentedGaugeCard.description: HTML/CSS segmented semicircle gauge card for status, spend, risk, and progress dashboards with editable segments, target value, and hover/focus tooltips.

radarChart.title: RadarChart
radarChart.description: HTML/CSS radar chart for comparing single or multi-series multi-axis scores with hover/focus point tooltips.

heatmapChart.title: HeatmapChart
heatmapChart.description: HTML/CSS density heatmap for day, time, and cohort intensity patterns with hover/focus cell tooltips.

activityTimelineCard.title: Activity Timeline Card
activityTimelineCard.description: HTML/CSS timeline card for activity, sleep, and operations dashboards with editable slots, segments, metrics, and hover/focus tooltips.

labeledDonutCard.title: Labeled Donut Card
labeledDonutCard.description: HTML/CSS donut chart card for segment comparison with central summary, external callout rows, and hover/focus segment tooltips.

retentionCohortCard.title: Retention Cohort Card
retentionCohortCard.description: HTML/CSS cohort retention card for dashboard grids with editable cohorts, periods, values, and hover/focus cell tooltips.

choroplethMap.title: ChoroplethMap
choroplethMap.description: HTML/CSS region density map for GeoJSON-style boundaries, markers, and ranked locations with hover/focus tooltips.

quadrantMatrix.title: QuadrantMatrix
quadrantMatrix.description: HTML/CSS four-quadrant matrix for plotting selectable items by x/y position with ranked values and hover/focus tooltips.

analyticsCard.title: AnalyticsCard
analyticsCard.description: Composable metric card shell for chart previews, deltas, and supporting context.
